name: Bug report

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment

- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- npm version: (run `npm --version`)
- Operating system:
- SkynetBench version / commit:

## Command that failed

```
npm run [command] -- [args]
```

## Error output

```
[paste error output here]
```

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Additional context

- Which pipeline stage failed (run-experiment / score / embed / analyze)?
- Was this a resume run or first run?
- Approximately how many runs had completed before failure?
